creation_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the BigQuery table was initially created

effective_labels.description: Active labels reflecting the current state of the BigQuery table

etag.description: ETag used to track changes and ensure consistent updates

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing this BigQuery table

last_modified_time.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the BigQuery table

location.description: Region where the BigQuery table's data is stored

num_bytes.description: Current storage size of the BigQuery table in bytes

num_long_term_bytes.description: Bytes stored in long-term storage for the table

num_rows.description: Count of rows currently stored in the BigQuery table

self_link.description: Direct API endpoint for managing or querying the table

terraform_labels.description: Labels assigned via Terraform configuration for organization
